cases.shortDescription: Convicted in a child rape and murder case in Dhaka.
cases.description: According to published reports and court proceedings, Sohel Rana was convicted in a case involving the rape and murder of a child in Pallabi, Dhaka. The court awarded the death penalty.
laws: Women and Children Repression Prevention Act, 2000 (Act No. VIII of 2000, Bangladesh)

timeline.title: Suspect Identified
timeline.detail: Investigation identified the accused following the incident.

timeline.title: Evidence Collected
timeline.detail: Investigators collected evidence and filed the case.

timeline.title: Arrested
timeline.detail: The accused was taken into police custody.

timeline.title: Court Proceedings
timeline.detail: The accused reportedly confessed before a magistrate.

timeline.title: Convicted
timeline.detail: The court found the accused guilty and awarded the death penalty.

cases.name: Sohel Rana
